## Meeting Purpose

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shifting to Monday morning weekly planning and Friday pipeline syncs, replacing daily standups](https://fathom.video/share/wh71tWD8K4yNqyCZgbYypoNmxZQNxo4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [Workshop follow-up strategy needed; Jason writing sequences, tier 1 accounts identified](https://fathom.video/share/wh71tWD8K4yNqyCZgbYypoNmxZQNxo4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Tyler ready to take calls next week; pitch/demo tests planned for certification](https://fathom.video/share/wh71tWD8K4yNqyCZgbYypoNmxZQNxo4Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)

## Topics

### HubSpot Pipeline Management
